name: 添加文档字符串
description: Agent 为没有 docstring 的函数添加文档
prompt: Add a one-line docstring to every function in math_ops.py that doesn't already have one.
setup_commands:
printf 'def add(a, b):
    return a + b

def multiply(a, b):
    """Multiply two numbers."""
    return a * b

def divide(a, b):
    return a / b
' > math_ops.py
